name: ppmt
description: Prompt engineering tools: transform raw prompts into structured formats like GCAO for better LLM responses.

skills.name: gcao
skills.description: Transforms a user's raw prompt into a structured GCAO prompt (Goal, Context, Actions, Output) for better LLM responses.

skills.name: universal
skills.description: Builds a full 7-component universal prompt (Role, Task, Audience, Context, Rules, Format, Success criteria) with confirmation pause. For complex tasks requiring total control.

skills.name: short
skills.description: Builds a compact 8-field prompt (Role, Desired output, Topic, Audience, Essential context, Rules, Format, Success criteria) for daily use. Quick setup, ~15 seconds.
